payload.body_text:
[Historical email excerpt]
Attached for your review, is a draft of a Master Firm Purchase/Sale Agreement 
between Cargill, Incorporated and Enron North America Corp.  Please do not 
hesitate to give me a call with your questions and or comments regarding this 
matter.



Regards,
Debra Perlingiere
Enron North America Corp.
Legal Department
1400 Smith Street, EB 3885
Houston, Texas 77002
dperlin@enron.com
Phone 713-853-7658
Fax  713-646-3490

[Excerpt limited by source data. Original body may be longer.]

[Historical email excerpt]
-----Original Message-----
From: 	pgraff@reliant.com@ENRON [mailto:IMCEANOTES-pgraff+40reliant+2Ecom+40ENRON@ENRON.com] 
Sent:	Thursday, July 12, 2001 10:22 AM
To:	Perlingiere, Debra
Subject:	Master Agreement

Debra,
